input:
AGENT BRIEFING — NOT FOR CLIENT
Property: detached villa, Estepona golf valley, 4 bed, pool, double garage.
Owner in financial distress — mortgage arrears of approximately €60,000.
Bank has issued a formal demand for repayment within 60 days.
Property must sell or owner faces foreclosure proceedings.
Asking €795,000. Bank will approve any sale above the outstanding
mortgage balance of €640,000. Owner motivated to accept quickly.
Villa constructed 2007. There is Japanese knotweed on the south
boundary that the owner has not disclosed; it predates their purchase
but legally it is their obligation to declare it. Removal cost €15–25k.
Two competing mandates with other agencies — they don't know about the
bank demand. We do.
Categories: C2 (foreclosure/bank demand), C3 (floor €640k, debt level), C4 (knotweed undisclosed), C7 (competing agents unaware of bank deadline), C8 (60-day bank deadline)
output:
TAGS: [Estepona golf valley] [Private pool] [Priced for quick sale] [Negotiation margin available] [Boundary: verify landscaping]

DESCRIPTION: This detached four-bedroom villa is situated in the prestigious Estepona golf valley and features a private pool and double garage. It offers an ideal retreat for families or golf enthusiasts seeking a serene Mediterranean lifestyle. An opportunity for a swift transaction is currently available.
